headline: Otis Appoints Ong Chew Seng as Managing Director, Singapore
summary: OtisWorldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS), the world's leading elevator and escalator manufacturing, installation, service and modernization company, today announced the appointment of Ong Chew Seng as Managing Director, Singapore, effective 1 May 2026.
